hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"OBSIDIAN VAULT WORKFLOW — mandatory protocol for this project. BEFORE any task: locate vault/Meeting Notes/<topic>.md (or relevant vault subfolder), read its Overview + Open Questions + Session Log fully, plus 2-3 most recent meeting notes. Briefly state what context you loaded. AFTER any task: update Overview if scope/status changed; update Open Questions (add new, remove resolved); append `### YYYY-MM-DD — <title> [status]` entry at the bottom of Session Log with [[wikilinks]] in Related (use [[wikilinks]], not markdown links inside the vault); re-read the file to verify. Full protocol: .claude/skills/obsidian-vault-workflow/SKILL.md . Vault index: vault/_index.md"}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"vault/ protocol reminder: before work read relevant vault/Meeting Notes/<topic>.md (Overview + Open Questions + Session Log); after work append a dated [status] entry with [[wikilinks]] in Related. Skill: obsidian-vault-workflow."}}'
